source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter Variable for fast English travel operations UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese itinerary dashboards, marine activity records, compact metric tables, and confident navigation labels.
layout: Precise 8px product grids, 8px cards, dorsal-fin dividers, speckled mahi texture bands, current-map chart panels, compact travel task surfaces, strong focus rings, and energetic status chips.

prompts.label: Transparent mahi mahi motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image_gen on flat #ff00ff chroma key, followed by local alpha extraction with remove_chroma_key.py.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only one single mahi mahi fish for a Morphous design-system catalog, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: accurate tropical mahi mahi in clean side profile, full body visible, with long compressed body, blunt forehead, forked tail, flowing dorsal fin, electric turquoise-blue back, yellow-gold belly, lime green and teal transitions, cobalt blue fin edges, small iridescent speckles, and wet pearlescent scale detail. The fish should feel high energy and travel-ready while remaining anatomically believable and polished as a catalog motif.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the dorsal fin, tail, mouth, belly, or fins. Slightly arcing swimming posture with a readable silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves iridescent tropical ocean color, scale texture, and natural fish anatomy.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no ocean, no reef, no water scene, no boat, no second fish, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Mahi Mahi", derived from the visible transparent mahi mahi motif in this conversation.
Reference use: Extract palette, iridescent scale texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the mahi mahi motif. The board must visibly respect electric turquoise-blue back, yellow-gold belly, lime green transitions, cobalt fin edges, teal speckles, and tropical ocean travel energy.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable section labels, generous spacing, and a precise grid. Avoid dense tiny tables. Text must be clean and legible at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Mahi Mahi", motif story "high energy travel system", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Palette labels to show: Wake Foam, Deep Pelagic, Mahi Turquoise, Golden Belly, Lime Flash, Cobalt Fin, Teal Speckle, Sunlit Spray, Reef Shadow, Signal Coral.
Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese typography guidance with readable sample labels such as "航海ダッシュボード" and "旅程の記録". Use multilingual font guidance for travel planning, marine activity, and fast operational dashboards.
Components: buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, popover, tooltip, table, search command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard KPI cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, area chart, empty state, error state, loading state.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design-system board, realistic crisp UI mockup, work-focused travel operations dashboard surface, 8px radius cards, controlled shadows, mahi-mahi speckle texture strips, dorsal-fin dividers, current-map chart cards, energetic but disciplined spacing.
Color palette: airy wake-foam background, white and pearly card surfaces, turquoise primary controls, yellow-gold highlights, lime status and chart accents, cobalt focused rings and selected states, teal supporting data, signal coral destructive/warning accents, deep pelagic text. Use motif-derived colors only plus near-neutrals from the fish.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic blue ocean app, no unrelated purple gradients, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no dark-mode-only surface.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Mahi Mahi". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible mahi mahi motif.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent mahi mahi motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Mahi Mahi board as references. Preserve turquoise primary controls, golden belly highlights, lime flash status accents, cobalt focus rings, teal speckle texture, 8px radius, typography hierarchy, travel operations dashboard language, and full component coverage.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, target 3840x2160 4K-class source image.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous spacing, and a precise grid. Avoid dense tiny token tables. Text must stay legible at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Mahi Mahi", label "Dark Mode", motif story "high energy travel system", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Palette labels to show: Deep Pelagic, Reef Shadow, Wake Foam, Mahi Turquoise, Golden Belly, Lime Flash, Cobalt Fin, Teal Speckle, Sunlit Spray, Signal Coral.
Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese typography guidance with readable sample labels such as "航海ダッシュボード" and "旅程の記録". Use multilingual font guidance for travel planning, marine activity, and fast operational dashboards.
Components: buttons, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, popover, tooltip, table, search command menu, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard KPI cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, area chart, empty state, error state, loading state.
Visual details: deep pelagic navy background, reef-shadow panels, wake-foam text, turquoise primary actions, golden selected highlights, lime status and chart accents, cobalt focus states, teal supporting charts, signal coral warning/destructive accents, subtle mahi-mahi speckle texture overlays, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-compatible cards and controls.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no generic blue ocean app, no neon nightclub palette, no pure flat black background, no unrelated purple gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of "Morphous Mahi Mahi" in the main title.
